summary: After reflecting on a close duel and the upcoming third job advancement, the protagonist receives news that the rebel base has been discovered and a major subjugation event is scheduled. Seeking to improve their skills, the protagonist completes a quest to restore the 10th floor, only to face a challenging trial against a Doppelganger. With the help of their unique pet, Teng, the protagonist utilizes specific buffs and strategic advantages to combat the copy and prepare for future challenges.
key_moments: The discovery of the rebel base is announced, triggering a main scenario event.
The protagonist completes a quest to restore access to the 10th floor.
The protagonist engages in a duel against a Doppelganger using their pet Teng to apply buffs and gain an advantage.
